overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage featuring a futuristic sports car in a rain-soaked, neon-lit Night City. The video begins with a third-person camera orbiting the parked vehicle before transitioning to a first-person cockpit view as the car engages flight mode and navigates through dense urban canyons between towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban plaza with neon advertisements and food stalls

agents.ego_description: circling around the parked futuristic vehicle, examining it from various angles in the heavy rain

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement featuring anime-style character and pizza graphics
small food kiosk with green neon signage and cartoon mascot character
tall dark building with illuminated windows rising into fog and rain
arched structure with orange neon trim providing partial cover over the street
tall multi-head lamps casting bright light through the rain

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits a sleek futuristic sports car parked on a rain-soaked street in a cyberpunk city. Neon signs illuminate the scene, including a prominent pizza billboard and a noodle stand, while tall skyscrapers disappear into the foggy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: vehicle interior cockpit with holographic dashboard

events.description: camera transitions from third-person exterior to first-person interior view inside the vehicle
flight control system engages and vehicle begins lifting off the ground

agents.ego_description: entering the driver's seat of the futuristic car and activating the flight systems

entered.detail: futuristic instrument panel with circular gauges and holographic displays
yoke-style control wheel with integrated buttons and metallic finish

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to first-person as the player enters the vehicle's cockpit. The dashboard illuminates with holographic displays before the flight control system engages and the car begins to lift off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial urban corridor with palm tree-lined streets below

events.description: vehicle accelerates forward and gains altitude, transitioning from ground to flight
passing through denser fog and rain between buildings while maintaining altitude

agents.ego_description: piloting the flying car through rainy city streets at low altitude, navigating between palm trees and buildings

entered.detail: row of palm trees lining the street below, visible through rain
pink illuminated hotel sign on distant building facade
wet asphalt street visible below the flying vehicle

segments.scene_description: From the cockpit view, the vehicle flies forward through the rainy cityscape, passing rows of palm trees and neon-lit buildings. The dashboard remains visible as the car maintains a low altitude above the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon-lit urban canyon with overhead structures and narrow passages

events.description: flying under an overpass structure into a narrower corridor between buildings
entering area with dense holographic advertisements and covered walkways

agents.ego_description: navigating the flying car through tight spaces between towering buildings, passing under overpasses and through neon-lit canyons

entered.detail: elevated roadway passing overhead with support columns and orange lighting
dense collection of illuminated advertisements and corporate signage
lowered roof structure creating a covered passage over the flight path
floating holographic display with rotating product imagery

segments.scene_description: The vehicle flies deeper into the urban canyon, passing under an overpass and navigating through a narrow corridor lined with dense neon signage and holographic advertisements. The space becomes increasingly enclosed as the car maneuvers between the towering building walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with an external view of a parked vehicle and transitions into a high-speed flight through a claustrophobic neon metropolis. It begins by orbiting a sleek futuristic sports car on a rain-soaked street, where neon signs and a pizza billboard glow against a foggy night sky. As the perspective shifts into the cockpit, holographic displays illuminate the dashboard before the flight control system engages and lifts the car off the wet pavement. The scene then expands as the vehicle flies forward over rows of palm trees and neon-lit buildings, maintaining a low altitude above the shimmering streets. Finally, the flight path dives deeper into an urban canyon, passing under an overpass and maneuvering through a narrow corridor of dense holographic advertisements and towering walls.
